opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head is throbbing with a burning pressure, the light feels like knives in my eyes, and my face is burning up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on over a few hours tonight and it's the worst headache — I'm scared and my thinking is fuzzy.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 3 hours ago with facial flushing, then a building severe headache
symptom_narrative.character: throbbing, burning pressure over the whole head, with facial flushing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: among the worst headaches I've had; light and sound are unbearable
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my head, plus my face/neck feel hot and flushed
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: a gradual build-up over hours rather than instant
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: dark, quiet and lying still help a little
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe brain fog, an internal tremor, and I can't think clearly
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have suspected mast cell problems and get flares, but this headache is severe and frightening

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: suspected mast cell activation with flushing and flares

allergies_as_reported.substance: no confirmed drug allergy; environmental/mast cell triggers

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing specific that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my flatmate is supervising me because I'm confused and in pain

communication_style.typical_message_style: brief, pained; flatmate assists due to confusion

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single home reading; cannot exclude evolving fever

objective_data_offered.value: my face and neck look red/flushed
flatmate says she's confused and slow but knows who and where she is
